core_mechanism: variational free-energy minimization over a hierarchical latent-variable generative model, in which both state inference and action/policy selection are cast as minimizing a single divergence (expected free energy) functional and the model is fit by variational Expectation-Maximization
brief_reason: The abstract builds its method on an active-inference formulation where policy selection minimizes expected free energy and the generative model is trained by variational EM, so both perception and control reduce to minimizing one variational free-energy functional over a nested (Markov-blanket) latent hierarchy.
